overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin driving on snow-covered highways and through tunnels in a truck simulator game. The scene features heavy snowfall, active windshield wipers, and transitions between open highway and enclosed tunnel environments with German road signage visible.

approaching tunnel shadow, ambient light begins to dim

metal guardrail along the left shoulder of the road
tall concrete noise barrier wall on the right side
dark tunnel entrance approaching ahead with snow-covered approach

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a snow-covered highway flanked by dense snow-laden forests. Windshield wipers actively clear the heavy snowfall as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance in the distance. A white car travels in the adjacent lane while concrete noise barriers line the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead artificial lighting

events.description: entered tunnel from snowy exterior environment
tunnel exit becomes visible as bright light at the far end
exiting tunnel back into daylight and snowy conditions

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, following the gentle curve of the road toward the exit

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red taillights visible, maintaining distance

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction lines
smooth concrete tunnel wall on the right side
overhead artificial lights mounted in the tunnel ceiling
bright daylight visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The truck travels through the enclosed concrete tunnel illuminated by overhead artificial lights. The snowy weather is temporarily left behind as the vehicle moves through the sheltered passage. Ahead, the bright daylight of the tunnel exit grows larger, with a vehicle visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway through snow-covered forest with overhead bridges

events.description: navigating right curve on the highway

agents.ego_description: driving along curving highway, passing blue directional road signs and navigating through the snowy landscape

entered.detail: dense snow-covered pine trees returning on both sides of the highway
concrete bridge structure crossing over the highway
blue highway directional sign with white text indicating destinations

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the truck returns to the open snowy highway winding through dense forests. The road curves gently as the vehicle passes under a concrete overpass. Blue directional signs are visible on the right side, and snow blankets the trees and ground on both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with noise barriers approaching second tunnel

events.description: overtaking or passing white truck ahead on the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed along straight sections, passing other vehicles and road signage

notable_agents.action: white truck driving ahead in the same lane, later passed by ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall concrete noise barrier wall returning on the right side
second tunnel entrance visible in the distance ahead
blue highway sign with German city names including Brugge and Weilach

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the straight highway, passing a white truck and blue road signs with German text. Concrete noise barriers line the right side as the vehicle approaches a second tunnel entrance. The snowy landscape continues with scattered trees and snow-covered embankments.

scene_state.functional_zone: second highway tunnel with artificial lighting and gentle curve

events.description: entered second tunnel from snowy highway
navigating gentle right curve inside the tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving through the second tunnel, following the road as it curves gently to the right

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with headlights on, maintaining distance in the same lane

entered.detail: concrete walls of the second tunnel section
overhead artificial lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the second tunnel, leaving the snowy weather behind once again. The vehicle travels through the illuminated concrete passage, following a gentle right curve. Another vehicle is visible ahead in the distance as the tunnel continues toward the far exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from a snowy open highway through a sheltered tunnel and back into a winter landscape. It begins on a road flanked by snow-laden forests and concrete noise barriers, with windshield wipers actively clearing heavy snowfall while a white car travels in the adjacent lane. As the truck approaches the tunnel entrance, the scene shifts from the bright, wintry exterior to an enclosed concrete passage illuminated by artificial overhead lights. The camera then follows the vehicle toward the growing glow of the tunnel exit before emerging back into the open air. Finally, the road curves gently under a concrete overpass and past blue directional signs, returning to the dense, snow-blanketed forests that line the highway.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a snowy open highway into the sheltered environment of a concrete tunnel. It begins by cruising along a straight road, passing a white truck and blue German road signs while concrete noise barriers line the right side. As the vehicle moves past snow-covered embankments and scattered trees, the camera approaches a second tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts abruptly from the wintry weather into an illuminated passage, following a gentle right curve. Finally, the truck travels deeper into the concrete tunnel, trailing another vehicle visible in the distance toward the far exit.
